LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE WAS A PARTNER AT MORRISON AND FOERSTER IN SAN FRANCISCO FROM 1997 UNTIL FEBRUARY 2005 WHEN SHE WAS APPOINTED TO THE SUPERIOR COURT. SHE RECOGNIZED THE NAME OF DAVID MCDOWELL WHOSE NAME APPEARS IN THE PLEADING. HE WAS ALSO A PARTNER AT MORRISON & FOERSTER. SHE HAVE NOT BEEN IN CONTACT WITH HIM SINCE SHE LEFT THE FIRM. THEY MAY HAVE WORKED BRIEFLY TOGETHER ON A LARGE IP CASE. NONE OF THIS WILL AFFECT THE COURT'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE AND DOES NOT BELIEVE THAT A PERSON, AWARE OF THE DISCLOSURE WOULD REASONABLY HAVE A DOUBT TO HER ABILITY TO BE FAIR IN THIS CASE. THE COURT GAVE COUNSEL AN OPPORUNITY TO ASK QUESTIONS. NO OBJECTIONS WERE RAISED OR QUESTIONS WERE ASKED. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANTS COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION AND COSTCO WHOLESALE MEMBERSHIP, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON THE MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDING. Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL BERKO APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PURVI G. PATEL OF MORRISON/FOERSTER, TEL. NO. (213) 892-5296 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE WAS A PARTNER AT MORRISON AND FOERSTER IN SAN FRANCISCO FROM 1997 UNTIL FEBRUARY 2005 WHEN SHE WAS APPOINTED TO THE SUPERIOR COURT. SHE RECOGNIZED THE NAME OF DAVID MCDOWELL WHOSE NAME APPEARS IN THE PLEADING. HE WAS ALSO A PARTNER AT MORRISON & FOERSTER. SHE HAVE NOT BEEN IN CONTACT WITH HIM SINCE SHE LEFT THE FIRM. THEY MAY HAVE WORKED BRIEFLY TOGETHER ON A LARGE IP CASE. NONE OF THIS WILL AFFECT THE COURT'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE AND DOES NOT BELIEVE THAT A PERSON, AWARE OF THE DISCLOSURE WOULD REASONABLY HAVE A DOUBT TO HER ABILITY TO BE FAIR IN THIS CASE. The Court gave counsel an opporunity to ask questions. No objections were raised or questions were asked. The matter was argued. DEFENDANTS COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION AND COSTCO WHOLESALE MEMBERSHIP, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON THE MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDING. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
